queries.question: Who are the staff working at the baggage claims and security checks at terminal 2?
queries.sql:
SELECT BaggageClaims.HandlerName as name
FROM BaggageClaims
WHERE BaggageClaims.Location = "Terminal 2"
UNION
SELECT SecurityChecks.OfficerName as name
FROM SecurityChecks
WHERE SecurityChecks.Location = "Terminal 2"
